task: Advanced task: Precision agriculture nitrogen prescription. Data: zones Z1 area=12ac NDVI=0.62 soil_N=18ppm yield_goal=190bu; Z2 area=9 NDVI=0.48 soil_N=11 yield_goal=175; Z3 area=15 NDVI=0.71 soil_N=24 yield_goal=205. Rule: base_N=0.9*yield_goal - soil_N*4; reduce 15% if NDVI>0.68; increase 10% if NDVI<0.50. Produce per-zone prescription (units: lbs N/acre) and total fertilizer (lbs N) estimate. Include intermediate calculations, uncertainty/sensitivity notes, validation checks, and a final decision table that ties every recommendation back to the supplied values. The response must be executable from the embedded packet alone, with no external data lookup required beyond understanding the cited public removed context.
